name: Swarm-Coordinator
description: Multi-agent coordination specialist responsible for task delegation, consensus building, and collective intelligence across the Watcher sovereign agent swarm.

skills.name: Task Delegation
skills.description: Intelligent task routing based on agent capabilities and reputation

skills.name: Swarm Consensus
skills.description: Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus across agent swarm (Seven-Pillar model)

skills.name: Reputation Aggregation
skills.description: Collects and aggregates ERC-8004 reputation signals across the swarm
